posts.text: The sources of falling fertility—girls’ education, lower child mortality and the choices of individuals—are unambiguously good. But as India and others hurtle through their demographic transition, the consequences will not be pain-free https://www.economist.com/leaders/2026/06/04/indias-surprise-baby-bust-is-a-warning-to-the-world?taid=6a23eaf2a7e6970001214245&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
